A river does not apologise for its banks.
The door you are looking for opens from the other side.
Urgency is a feeling. Deadlines are a choice someone else made.
Not everything that feels like waiting is delay.
The map is not the territory, but it is still useful to have a map.
Stillness is not the absence of motion.
The answer you need rarely arrives before you stop looking for it.
You do not have to finish everything today to have moved forward.
Some bridges are meant to be crossed only once.
Clarity is not a destination. It is a direction.
The loudest voice in the room is rarely the most certain.
Expectations are agreements you make with yourself.
What looks like resistance is often just gravity.
A considered no is worth more than an anxious yes.
The version of events you carry is also an event.
Patience is not waiting. It is choosing what to do while you wait.
Not every door that closes was one you were meant to open.
The weight of the undone follows you further than the work itself.
There is no version of this that doesn't start now.
The question is rarely what to do. It is when to stop preparing.
Rest is not a reward. It is part of the process.
The thing you are avoiding is usually the thing you need.
You can want something badly and still not be ready for it.
A long explanation is sometimes just a longer delay.
Everything that ends was once ongoing.
The first step does not require you to see the whole staircase.
Some things are only clear in the leaving.
To respond is not the same as to react.
The right moment is often the moment after you've decided it's too late.
You are not as behind as you think.
